message:
Fix drop, placement, and dialog-management bugs

- Only swap with drop target if dragged window fits within the
  target's footprint; otherwise revert to old position or best-fit.
- Allow full-size windows to drop into empty shelf cells (the drag
  overlay no longer clamps out of the reserved area).
- Remove the drop-in-shelf auto-minimize gesture — the shelf is now
  a normal drop target.
- Add forcePlaceWindow() as a last-resort placement that allows
  collisions, and use it when unminimizing into a full grid so the
  window stays on-screen.
- Stop managing DIALOG-type and transient windows. Extension prefs
  dialogs were being grid-placed (and moved off-screen as stamps),
  leaving the prefs window invisible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
